allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\posFirstan\\apps\\backend, C:\\posFirstan\\apps\\frontend, C:\\posFirstan\\packages\\database -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\posFirstan\\apps\\frontend; & npx vite build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "built in|error|dist/" | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\posFirstan\\apps\\frontend; & npx vite build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "built in|error|dist/assets" | Select-Object -First 6 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
